app_description: Sticky-note inspired customer interaction planner and mini CRM.
dashboard_quick_start: What would you like to do?
dashboard_quick_start_hint: Add a client or a task to get data flowing into your dashboard.
reminders_intro: All notes with a reminder date/time (with or without a client), soonest first. Standalone notes without a reminder date stay under Standalone notes.
reports_intro: Pick a date range for a full activity log: clients and notes (created and updated), tasks (created, updated while pending, completed, failed), tags, and workspace/audit events for your team. Export to PDF or Excel.
reports_empty: No records in this date range.
reports_invalid_range: Start date must be before end date.
team_intro: Clients, notes, and tasks are shared in your team workspace. Admins can invite new users and manage each member's name, username, email, role, password, and active/passive status from the Edit screen in the member list.
team_intro_member: You only see your own membership here. Update your display name and password below. The full member list and invites are visible to admins only.
team_owner_only_rename: Only admin can change the name.
team_invite_help: Share the link; when someone opens it and signs up, they join this workspace. (Existing accounts cannot use this invite.)
team_profile_email_hint: The email you sign in with cannot be changed here.
team_profile_error_new_short: New password must be at least 6 characters.
team_profile_error_current_required: Enter your current password to set a new one.
team_profile_error_generic: Could not save. Please try again.
team_member_edit_intro: Manage this member's name, email, username, role, password, and active status from this screen.
team_member_edit_new_password_placeholde: Leave empty to keep current password
team_member_edit_error_email_exists: This email is already in use.
team_member_edit_error_username_exists: This username is already in use.
team_member_edit_error_last_admin: At least one active admin must remain.
team_member_archive_error_generic: Could not archive member. Please try again.
team_member_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this member?
team_member_delete_error_self: You cannot delete your own account from this screen.
team_member_delete_error_generic: Could not delete member. Please try again.
team_member_owner_always_active: The admin account is always active.
team_member_save_error: Could not save. Please try again.
team_member_error_owner_deactivate: The admin account cannot be set passive.
team_member_error_self_deactivate: You cannot deactivate your own account here.
team_member_create_help: As admin, you can create a new team user directly. The user is added to this workspace as an active user.
team_member_create_success: Member created and added to workspace.
team_member_create_error_generic: Could not create member. Please try again.
team_workspace_suspended_body: The workspace owner set your membership to passive. Contact them to regain access.
team_workspace_suspended_logout_hint: You can sign out and log in with a different account.
workspace_inactive_login: This account is passive in this workspace. Contact the owner.
register_solo_hint: You get your own workspace; you can invite others from the Team page.
register_with_invite_hint: This link will add you to a team workspace after you sign up.
register_has_account: Already have an account? Log in
register_error_generic: Could not complete registration. Check your details.
join_logged_in_hint: Invite links are for new accounts only. To add someone, log out and send them the link, or have them register in a private window.
login_error_csrf: Security check failed. Refresh the page and try again using the same host (localhost or 127.0.0.1).
login_network_error: Could not reach the server. Make sure the dev server is running (npm run dev) and the URL is correct.
login_error_database: Database file or configuration is wrong. Check .env and run npx prisma db push.
forbidden_area: This area is available to admins only.
login_help: Demo account, sign up, or use a team invite link.
client_picker_subtitle: Click a client to open their card and notes
quick_add_client_hint: Required fields only. You will open this client’s page after save.
active_tasks_metric_caption_tasks: “Incomplete or overdue” shows tasks with a saved note or past deadline. “Completed” shows finished tasks.
active_tasks_metric_caption: Pending task summary. On the dashboard or tasks page, the filter updates counts and expanded lists.
no_incomplete_tasks: No pending tasks with an incomplete note or overdue deadline.
followups_metric_caption: Pending tasks due on or before the end of the selected period.
quick_note_option_client_desc: Pick a client and save a short note from the dashboard.
quick_note_option_full_desc: Create a note without a client first, then edit it to link a client or turn it into a task.
standalone_quick_note_placeholder: Write your note without picking a client yet…
standalone_note_hint: This note appears on the dashboard. Double-click to assign a client or convert to a task.
pick_client_for_quick_note: Choose a client for quick note
no_standalone_notes_recent: No standalone notes without a reminder date yet. Standalone reminders appear under Reminders.
double_click_client_details: Click to select · Double-click for full details
quick_note_placeholder: What happened with this client? (fast sticky note entry)
client_contact_whatsapp_choose_hint: Choose how you want to open the chat.
convert_to_task_requires_client: Select a client above to create a task from this note. If you set a “Next” date, it will be used as the task deadline; otherwise tomorrow is used.
not_completed_modal_hint: Free text for now; preset options can be added later.
not_completed_placeholder: E.g. client did not respond, waiting for approval…
task_completion_modal_hint: Optionally note what happened while completing the task. Save marks the task as done.
task_completion_placeholder: E.g. client approved, delivered, follow-up notes…
search_placeholder: Search clients, notes, tags, or @team member…
delete_confirm: Delete this client and all notes/tasks?
select_client: Select a client from the left to view notes
no_notes_yet: There are no notes for this client yet
clients_excel_admin_only_hint: Excel import/export is available to admins only.
no_clients_found: No clients found for this filter
repeat_task_explain: The task moves back to your pending list and you are taken to the Tasks page.
quick_option_reminder_desc: Note with date/time; with a client or standalone.
quick_option_task_desc: Pick a client, then set title and deadline.
pick_client_for_reminder: Choose a client for the reminder
pick_client_for_task: Choose a client for the task
reminder_with_client_desc: A dated reminder note linked to a client.
reminder_standalone_short_desc: No client yet; shows in dashboard reminders.
reminder_form_hint: Reminder date and time are required.
reminder_standalone_hint: Reminder time is required. You can link a client later by editing the note.
